name: Risotto Con La Zucca
recipeInstructions:
Time required: 30 min ca.
1. Bring 1 litre of water to a boil.
2. In a separate pan, fry the chopped onion in half the butter until softened.
3. Add the rice and cubed Milanese pumpkin to the pan with the onion. Cook for a short time until slightly roasted.
4. Gradually pour in the boiling water, stirring continuously.
5. About halfway through cooking, add the crumbled stock cube.
6. Finish by adding grated Parmesan and remaining butter before serving.
Notes: This recipe requires dry Milanese pumpkin (also known as Butternut squash) which has a dark knobbly skin and dark orange, firm flesh. Neapolitan pumpkin is too watery.
